Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Silent King]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — The Silent King stirs in its dreams when it senses the Phoenix in battle.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — The Silent King is associated with the Silent Servants cult.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — The Silent King is one of the most subtle and insidious of the Dreadgods.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — The Silent King is a Dreadgod with no remaining representative in the Shen faction's audience tower.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — The Silent King is a suggested topic related to Emriss Silentborn.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 14''' — The Silent King is theoretically the most vulnerable of the Dreadgods.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — The Silent King is a giant white tiger.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — The Silent King had a purple-and-white tank.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — The Silent King is a Dreadgod.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — The Silent King has maintained its mental faculties unlike its siblings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — The Silent King's body is roughly the size of a human house.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — The Silent King can be overpowered by an average human Herald.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — The Silent King possesses hunger madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — The Silent King uses spiritual perception to monitor its kingdom's boundaries.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — The Silent King desires revenge against Emriss Silentborn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — The Silent King can withstand its hunger urges through willpower.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — The Silent King experiences hunger aura.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — The Silent King is a Dreadgod who has been freed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — The Silent King's body is in hiding.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — The Silent King is located in central Everwood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — The situation regarding the Silent King is urgent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — The Silent King is a character who refers to intruders as bold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — The people are puppets of the Silent King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — The Silent King is associated with horror stories.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — The Silent King controls people like helpless puppets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — The Silent King threatened to attack Lindon's friends and family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 4''' — The Silent King uses a parasitic technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 4''' — The Silent King is a threat to the Everwood continent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — The Silent King can speak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — The Silent King has a technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — The Silent King is a peer to the monster that destroyed the Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon made an Enforcer construct for the Silent King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 14''' — The Silent King is an entity that people bow before.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — The Silent King has white crowns.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — The Silent King whispered into Lindon's mind that he keeps his promises.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 16''' — The Silent King's dream technique washed over Moongrave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 16''' — The Silent King's will and techniques are present in the battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 16''' — The Silent King has a halo.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 16''' — The Silent King can use a technique to control the minds of the masses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 16''' — The Silent King ordered the Golds to go wild in the city.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — The Silent King can exert greater control over Remnants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — The Silent King can possess members of Redmoon Hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — The Silent King's influence can bolster the willpower of those he possesses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — The Silent King had thralls that tried to attack Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon calls the Dreadgod's halo the Silent King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — The Silent King is a white tiger with smooth pale skin and black stripes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — The Silent King's face resembles a detailed Remnant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — The Silent King's crown shines bright as the sun.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — The Silent King is a Dreadgod who appears as a giant tiger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — The Silent King's army is fighting in the distance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — The Silent King's madra can be identified by eating it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — The Silent King's deadliest power is its mental assault.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — The Silent King is a small Dreadgod.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — The Silent King is a figure whose victory Lindon sees in a dream.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — The Silent King is considered the weakest of the Dreadgods.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — The Silent King was on the verge of death.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — The Silent King’s madra should be useful in divining the future.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — The Silent King is a Dreadgod that Lindon killed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 22''' — The illusions used were the illusions of the Silent King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 22''' — The Silent King possesses madra that can fuel illusions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 22''' — Lindon wants to craft a Divine Treasure from the Silent King’s core binding.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 22''' — The Silent King is gone, having been killed by the Void Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — The Silent King has a specific technique that involves illusory clones.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 24''' — The Silent King's power corrupted Wei Shi Lindon Arelius.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon consumed the Silent King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 4''' — The Silent King's spirit consists of bones, tendons, and other material.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 5''' — The Silent King's body material is used to make Lindon's special arrows.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon's Dreadgod arm is stimulated by the Silent King’s modified madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon uses a Silent King illusion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — The Silent King has madra that produces white light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — The Silent King can project illusions solid enough to trade blows with Monarchs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — The Weeping Dragon was empowered by the death of the Silent King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — The Silent King has died.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon used materials from the Silent King to create purple orbs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — The Silent King was forced to swap places with the Wandering Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — The Weeping Dragon's binding is more like a normal binding than the Silent King’s.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 22''' — The Silent King is associated with a halo that serves as a Goldsign for the Silent Servants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — The scale of Dross's dream aura temporarily matched the Silent King.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — The Silent King challenged the wards of House Arelius and was defeated.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Dross wears the pure-white halo of the Silent King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Kahn Mala was the former cult leader of the Silent King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — The Silent King was traded places with by the Wandering Titan.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
